one_time_description: Logging revenue - new revenue stream not present in prior year
economic_notes: Netaskinan Contracting is a new segment in 2022 with $7,777,291 in expenses. Logging revenue of $5,946,861 introduced in 2022. First Nations Development Fund active. 2133182 AB Ltd. is a business entity accounted for under modified equity method.
notes: Audit qualified for three reasons: (1) insufficient audit evidence for 2133182 AB Ltd. business entity with $297,195 revenue recorded; (2) inability to observe physical inventory count; (3) no budget prepared as required by Canadian public sector accounting standards. Netaskinan Contracting is a new consolidated entity in 2022 with $7,777,291 expenses and no comparative. Capital lease obligations of $920,144 introduced in 2022. Funds held in trust of $8,723,479 reported on balance sheet with offsetting amount in accumulated surplus. Long-term debt includes term loans due on demand $3,016,275 plus capital lease obligations $920,144. Net impact of change in presentation of business entity ($3,821,575) recorded in statement of changes in net financial assets.
